items.name_en: 'Burberry'
items.name_cn:
'Burberry'
Small crossbody bag 'Title-Tyler Bag', made of leather and canvas with decorative topstitching. Features the Fashion Show Horseferry print, a refined top metal bar design, and three rivet closures.
Size: W19×H15×D5cm
Model: 2731, Small
Shortest vertical strap length: 47cm
Longest vertical strap length: 53cm
Adjustable crossbody strap
2 interior compartments
Top flap with magnetic snap closure
Hand-painted edges
Glossy metal hardware
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 'Celine'
items.name_cn:
'Celine'
👑Celine Model: 8001 [Embroidery Collection] Love it! The embroidery collection is here! Get your retro vibe on~ It has a different feel from the Monogram, I love them both~ This popular crossbody bag is super versatile. The shape is retro, cool, and a bit cute. Super exquisite and compact♡
I've always loved C E L I NE. This minimalist style is retro and stylish. This lightweight and easy-to-match vintage bag, do you like it?
Dimensions: 25x14x7cm

items.name_en: (Dynamic Chip Version) Original Enhanced Version
items.name_cn:
(Dynamic Chip Version) Original Enhanced Version
🔝CANOÉ Tote
Model: M83480
Crafted from Monogram canvas, this bag combines the drawstring of the Noé bag with the molded bottom of the Cannes bag, offering both trendy style and practical function. The woven chain and leather shoulder strap are detachable for multiple carrying ways.
Size: 14*20.5*14

items.name_en: (Large) DI0R Oblique 2019s Backpack
items.name_cn:
(Large) DI0R Oblique 2019s Backpack
A couple's style DI0R Oblique backpack. In addition to the vintage pattern, it features small metal logos, giving it a soft and cute look. The canvas material is very lightweight, has a large capacity, and is practical with a great appearance ~
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has integrated into everyone's fashionable attitude~ Carrying vintage items makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week wherever you go. Highly recommended🖤 for a couple's look
Large: 29×14×36 CM
Small: 23.5×11×32 CM
#088#510

items.name_en: (Large) DI0R Oblique Pink Elephant Backpack
items.name_cn:
(Large) DI0R Oblique Pink Elephant Backpack
A DI0R Oblique backpack that can be a couple's choice. Based on the embroidered elephant design, it also features a small metal logo, looking cute and soft. The canvas material is very lightweight, has a large capacity, is light in weight, and is practical with a great look ~
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has blended into everyone's fashionable attitude~ Carrying a vintage item makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week wherever you go. Recommended🖤 for a couple's look
Small: 23.5×11×32CM
Large: 29×14×36CM
#1523# 510
